textByHash.ce8dd78e9c8b2136861607d13c1d1fca8104cc15: Look - a newcomer. I'd say let me be the first to welcome you to Ape Atoll, but I see you've already met the welcoming party...
textByHash.44276c0ac754f41c9b78455a2d904bd6751e6700: Well we're certainly missing home, I'll give you that.
textByHash.38e93b072e1107bad48d6409b6d2b52f5b4aabd9: Oh, not for too long ... The jail guards keep us entertained every now and then too.
textByHash.08eff99fcd39e726814f162957c4c9da3e7bb458: Oh yeah. Trefaji and Aberab - they're as dense as bricks. They do give mighty punches though.
textByHash.ae31dbeca39d9df36f09fbb67ce48dfa74a86a55: Now, now lads, watch your language. You'll have to excuse them, human, they're only soldiers!
textByHash.1bb0a94d012eeed4f36a372502ff802355374f38: So human, what can we do for you?
textByHash.581101569678a99c81938707e30a0d56599a1326: Do your best to ignore him...
textByHash.ec4d8c3598e42c35901c62bc5987c183f13af414: To be fair human, you're not much help stuck in there.
textByHash.c16e950ef72190238bbb44c127f42599b936253f: Well, you can try picking the lock on your door. Watch out for the guards though.
textByHash.6b265aeaae7da9ee9bf726aedce97c387ea93b74: We've been trying to pick ours but we haven't been able to do so yet.
textByHash.f8dc2382a8cd9440b32b9bfa009880fe6ae4d9ce: What can I do for you, human?
textByHash.eaecec8c6c800087b9b79c96222534278acd342a: And another one ... eats the dirt.
textByHash.6254f4daf4ba8a042bbaf4378b7a43108ae2a1c4: You know, we could try and break out ourselves.
textByHash.52416df9d84961c6456443475a839f13629d70b7: Carado - are you thinking what I'm thinking?
textByHash.61295eff27050cd4fbe6e7f50bd104d0225bcc1d: ... and that completes our tour of the Jail of the Future. Please remember to use your conveniently located and totally pickable cell-door to exit.
textByHash.5636f58a473032ff0867a6083df0ad1a8c9aa6de: and B - I - N - G - O. I win!
textByHash.bb42cd1a4c825554005d38374358a8e4b82356d8: Do you ever look up at the stars at night and think about just how insignificant all of this is?
textByHash.c723c95490c66a08e5497b5ac0005bc102d96f77: Don't you ever get tired of, you know, wandering around?
textByHash.2af892a002c6fe21f5a640c7592719a775c64d37: Those cheerleaders down the Gnomeball pitch...
textByHash.93e66f3fd01027596f376cd0153947358155bbcb: Darn you, Carado - you always get the large jail cells.
textByHash.1cbeb5c3d5eb803abb4c27255f3aa53a12ea0a1a: The Prince Ali thing? We all shared a cell that time.
textByHash.b3ea1214ce9c78ca02ca1def080bddc343538dff: ... and please remain prone until the room has come to a complete stop.
textByHash.0037f7dd9c3eb84e90aa46b784ec8f34152f4953: Have you noticed how they all look the same?
textByHash.5d2a4c23abbd99a440e05158caca620a845d1632: No matter how many monkeys these people seem to kill, there are never any fewer of them...
textByHash.fb9c2455d965d7c84f9adbd9ec2633c4d580b427: ... and then the chicken said to the farmer: 'It was an aspirin!'
textByHash.48a170d86be0c57a1aa4dc656c4f56cd57031891: Have we seen this one before?
textByHash.459575fbdbf43c9541116503e953bc863e3c4ada: You know, you should really try to avoid being captured.
textByHash.192463cd4ea3b932bc98815bf673d4dba2332daf: ... and that's how I saved Narnode from the fire-breathing gnome-eating lizard-dragon-king of Jool.
textByHash.d5d3a0d2800a7a5d59e8a1df0f4aa411ec72f7f4: Look at that Bunkdo, he almost looks like they're praying.
textByHash.47d573a2485980006862663a7aec59255371a0c4: Look at that Bunkdo, she almost looks like they're praying.
textByHash.4e25f4b8ae5315d6d9e604274a5e0a22e3e3c1c6: Look at that Bunkdo, they almost looks like they're praying.
textByHash.b0072da2fc0262665747fc0ab43ab6fffd9efabd: Oh my god - he's been through here ten times now.
textByHash.340562e15b3c2682a1b109824293f04f2f8d9468: Oh my god - she's been through here ten times now.
textByHash.b4c1aab2b0fbb7041681579b6883de040e1551e7: Oh my god - they've been through here ten times now.
textByHash.c172cee51ed45f00476417a0d401176930bccd8e: I'm beginning to lose count now.
textByHash.e0a4d4ccd0dacc64f53e72e50f4764527dc83a8d: Twenty times! Give this kid an applause!
textByHash.7bb1cd4592207742cbf93c19a274bbcd7d0b4022: Yes. We are working undercover here. Isn't that right, guys?
textByHash.db12dc35b5a036424f46f82e358d4a29d883f5a8: Don't just stand there, , help us deal with these abominations!
textByHash.01fe8eb73ba459f01768f8e0d5b949bcc216f1fb: Good work dealing with those abominations, , you should talk to the commander.
textByHash.7413cd476c4b6d96e8af5aee0947eb075ab0e1a0: We've secured the crash site, you've proven that you can handle yourself against these demonic gorillas, so feel free to head down to the cavern whenever you like.
